description_long: This lounge set features a modern sectional sofa with a chaise extension, a matching armchair, and a rectangular coffee table, all arranged on a large area rug against a plain wall. The sectional sofa has a low-profile, boxy silhouette with multiple seat and back cushions, including a corner cushion for added comfort. The armchair mirrors the sofa's design, with thick, plush cushions and squared armrests. The coffee table is simple and flat, providing a functional surface in front of the seating. The upholstery appears to be a solid, dark fabric, with subtle textural details visible on the cushions. The overall arrangement suggests a comfortable, communal seating area suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern sectional lounge set with a chaise, armchair, and coffee table, all featuring plush cushions and a solid dark fabric upholstery on a large rug.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sectional sofa, armchair, coffee table, and rug, with all cushions and seating surfaces visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the armchair and sectional, as well as the thickness of the cushions and armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view with the wall backdrop, showing the back profile of the lounge set and minimal visible detail of the seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the chaise extension of the sectional and the arrangement of the armchair and coffee table.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple loose seat and back cushions on the sectional and armchair, including a corner cushion and chaise section; cushions are thick and plush, arranged for comfort.
attribute_backrest_design: Low, straight backrests with segmented, rectangular cushions; no visible tufting or headrests, offering a modern, streamlined look.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; squared, padded armrests at both ends of the sectional and on the armchair, matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, blocky, and likely made of wood or metal, mostly hidden beneath the upholstery for a low-profile appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a subtle, uniform texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
